messages.content:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：创建一个太空射击游戏。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。

modifications.prompt:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：创建一个太空射击游戏。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。
modifications.code:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>太空射击</title>
<style>
* {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}
body {
    background: #0a0a1a;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    min-height: 100vh;
    font-family: 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif;
    overflow: hidden;
}
canvas {
    max-width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    display: block;
    margin: 0 auto;
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="gameCanvas"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
canvas.width = 360;
canvas.height = 640;

// Game state
let gameState = 'menu'; // menu, playing, paused, gameover
let score = 0;
let highScore = parseInt(localStorage.getItem('spaceShooterHighScore')) || 0;
let level = 1;
let combo = 0;
let comboTimer = 0;
let screenShake = 0;
let lastTime = 0;
let gameTime = 0;

// Stars background
const stars = [];
for (let i = 0; i < 100; i++) {
    stars.push({
        x: Math.random() * 360,
        y: Math.random() * 640,
        size: Math.random() * 2 + 0.5,
        speed: Math.random() * 60 + 20,
        brightness: Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.5
    });
}

// Player
const player = {
    x: 180,
    y: 540,
    width: 32,
    height: 36,
    speed: 240,
    lives: 3,
    maxLives: 5,
    invincible: 0,
    fireRate: 0.18,
    fireTimer: 0,
    powerLevel: 0,
    shield: false,
    shieldTimer: 0,
    trail: []
};

// Arrays
let bullets = [];
let enemies = [];
let particles = [];
let explosions = [];
let powerups = [];
let enemyBullets = [];

// Input
const keys = {};
let touchX = null;
let touchActive = false;
let shooting = false;

// Enemy spawn
let enemySpawnTimer = 0;
let enemySpawnRate = 1.2;
let waveTimer = 0;
let bossActive = false;

// Particle class helper
function createParticle(x, y, color, count, speed, life) {
    for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
        const angle = Math.random() * Math.PI * 2;
        const spd = Math.random() * speed + speed * 0.3;
        particles.push({
            x: x,
            y: y,
            vx: Math.cos(angle) * spd,
            vy: Math.sin(angle) * spd,
            life: life || (Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.3),
            maxLife: life || (Math.random() * 0.5 + 0.3),
            color: color,
            size: Math.random() * 3 + 1
        });
    }
}

function createExplosion(x, y, size, color) {
    explosions.push({
        x: x,
        y: y,
        radius: 0,
        maxRadius: size,
        life: 1,
        color: color || '#ff6b35'
    });
    createParticle(x, y, color || '#ff6b35', 12, 120, 0.6);
    createParticle(x, y, '#ffdd57', 8, 80, 0.4);
    screenShake = 5;
}

// Spawn enemy
function spawnEnemy() {
    const types = ['basic', 'fast', 'tank', 'zigzag', 'shooter'];
    let availableTypes = ['basic'];
    if (level >= 2) availableTypes.push('fast');
    if (level >= 3) availableTypes.push('zigzag');
    if (level >= 4) availableTypes.push('tank');
    if (level >= 5) availableTypes.push('shooter');

    const type = availableTypes[Math.floor(Math.random() * availableTypes.length)];
    const x = Math.random() * 300 + 30;

    let enemy = {
        x: x,
        y: -30,
        type: type,
        fireTimer: 0,
        time: 0,
        startX: x
    };

    switch (type) {
        case 'basic':
            enemy.width = 28;
            enemy.height = 28;
            enemy.hp = 1;
            enemy.maxHp = 1;
            enemy.speed = 80 + level * 5;
            enemy.score = 10;
            enemy.color = '#ff6b6b';
            break;
        case 'fast':
            enemy.width = 22;
            enemy.height = 22;
            enemy.hp = 1;
            enemy.maxHp = 1;
            enemy.speed = 160 + level * 8;
            enemy.score = 15;
            enemy.color = '#ffd93d';
            break;
        case 'zigzag':
            enemy.width = 26;
            enemy.height = 26;
            enemy.hp = 2;
            enemy.maxHp = 2;
            enemy.speed = 70 + level * 5;
            enemy.score = 20;
            enemy.color = '#6bcb77';
            break;
        case 'tank':
            enemy.width = 36;
            enemy.height = 36;
            enemy.hp = 4 + Math.floor(level / 2);
            enemy.maxHp = 4 + Math.floor(level / 2);
            enemy.speed = 40 + level * 3;
            enemy.score = 40;
            enemy.color = '#9b59b6';
            break;
        case 'shooter':
            enemy.width = 30;
            enemy.height = 30;
            enemy.hp = 2;
            enemy.maxHp = 2;
            enemy.speed = 50 + level * 4;
            enemy.score = 30;
            enemy.color = '#e74c3c';
            enemy.fireRate = 1.5;
            break;
    }

    enemies.push(enemy);
}

function spawnBoss() {
    if (bossActive) return;
    bossActive = true;
    enemies.push({
        x: 180,
        y: -60,
        width: 60,
        height: 50,
        type: 'boss',
        hp: 30 + level * 10,
        maxHp: 30 + level * 10,
        speed: 30,
        score: 200 + level * 50,
        color: '#e74c3c',
        fireTimer: 0,
        fireRate: 0.8,
        time: 0,
        startX: 180,
        phase: 0,
        targetY: 80
    });
}

function spawnPowerup(x, y) {
    const types = ['power', 'shield', 'life', 'rapid'];
    const weights = [40, 25, 15, 20];
    let total = weights.reduce((a, b) => a + b);
    let rand = Math.random() * total;
    let type = types[0];
    for (let i = 0; i < weights.length; i++) {
        rand -= weights[i];
        if (rand <= 0) { type = types[i]; break; }
    }

    let color, symbol;
    switch (type) {
        case 'power': color = '#4fd1c5'; symbol = 'P'; break;
        case 'shield': color = '#63b3ed'; symbol = 'S'; break;
        case 'life': color = '#fc8181'; symbol = '♥'; break;
        case 'rapid': color = '#ffd93d'; symbol = 'R'; break;
    }

    powerups.push({
        x: x,
        y: y,
        width: 20,
        height: 20,
        type: type,
        color: color,
        symbol: symbol,
        speed: 60,
        time: 0
    });
}

function fireBullet() {
    const bx = player.x;
    const by = player.y - player.height / 2;

    bullets.push({
        x: bx,
        y: by,
        width: 4,
        height: 12,
        speed: 500,
        damage: 1,
        color: '#4fd1c5'
    });

    if (player.powerLevel >= 1) {
        bullets.push({
            x: bx - 12,
            y: by + 5,
            width: 3,
            height: 10,
            speed: 480,
            damage: 1,
            color: '#63b3ed'
        });
        bullets.push({
            x: bx + 12,
            y: by + 5,
            width: 3,
            height: 10,
            speed: 480,
            damage: 1,
            color: '#63b3ed'
        });
    }

    if (player.powerLevel >= 2) {
        bullets.push({
            x: bx - 8,
            y: by,
            width: 3,
            height: 10,
            speed: 490,
            damage: 1,
            color: '#b794f6',
            vx: -30
        });
        bullets.push({
            x: bx + 8,
            y: by,
            width: 3,
            height: 10,
            speed: 490,
            damage: 1,
            color: '#b794f6',
            vx: 30
        });
    }

    createParticle(bx, by, '#4fd1c5', 3, 40, 0.15);
}

function fireEnemyBullet(enemy) {
    const angle = Math.atan2(player.y - enemy.y, player.x - enemy.x);
    const speed = 150 + level * 10;
    enemyBullets.push({
        x: enemy.x,
        y: enemy.y + enemy.height / 2,
        vx: Math.cos(angle) * speed,
        vy: Math.sin(angle) * speed,
        radius: 4,
        color: '#ff6b6b'
    });
}

function rectCollision(a, b) {
    return Math.abs(a.x - b.x) < (a.width + b.width) / 2 &&
           Math.abs(a.y - b.y) < (a.height + b.height) / 2;
}

function circleRectCollision(cx, cy, cr, rx, ry, rw, rh) {
    const dx = Math.abs(cx - rx);
    const dy = Math.abs(cy - ry);
    return dx < rw / 2 + cr && dy < rh / 2 + cr;
}

function resetGame() {
    player.x = 180;
    player.y = 540;
    player.lives = 3;
    player.invincible = 0;
    player.powerLevel = 0;
    player.shield = false;
    player.shieldTimer = 0;
    player.fireRate = 0.18;
    player.fireTimer = 0;
    player.trail = [];
    score = 0;
    level = 1;
    combo = 0;
    comboTimer = 0;
    gameTime = 0;
    enemySpawnTimer = 0;
    enemySpawnRate = 1.2;
    waveTimer = 0;
    bossActive = false;
    bullets = [];
    enemies = [];
    particles = [];
    explosions = [];
    powerups = [];
    enemyBullets = [];
}

function damagePlayer() {
    if (player.invincible > 0) return;

    if (player.shield) {
        player.shield = false;
        player.shieldTimer = 0;
        createParticle(player.x, player.y, '#63b3ed', 20, 100, 0.5);
        screenShake = 3;
        return;
    }

    player.lives--;
    player.invincible = 2;
    player.powerLevel = Math.max(0, player.powerLevel - 1);
    combo = 0;
    createParticle(player.x, player.y, '#ff6b6b', 20, 120, 0.6);
    screenShake = 8;

    if (player.lives <= 0) {
        gameState = 'gameover';
        createExplosion(player.x, player.y, 50, '#ff6b6b');
        if (score > highScore) {
            highScore = score;
            localStorage.setItem('spaceShooterHighScore', highScore);
        }
    }
}

// UPDATE
function update(deltaTime) {
    if (gameState !== 'playing') return;

    gameTime += deltaTime;

    // Level progression
    const newLevel = Math.floor(gameTime / 30) + 1;
    if (newLevel > level) {
        level = newLevel;
        enemySpawnRate = Math.max(0.3, 1.2 - level * 0.08);
    }

    // Boss spawn every 45 seconds
    waveTimer += deltaTime;
    if (waveTimer >= 45 && !bossActive) {
        spawnBoss();
        waveTimer = 0;
    }

    // Combo timer
    if (comboTimer > 0) {
        comboTimer -= deltaTime;
        if (comboTimer <= 0) combo = 0;
    }

    // Player movement
    let dx = 0, dy = 0;
    if (keys['ArrowLeft'] || keys['a'] || keys['A']) dx = -1;
    if (keys['ArrowRight'] || keys['d'] || keys['D']) dx = 1;
    if (keys['ArrowUp'] || keys['w'] || keys['W']) dy = -1;
    if (keys['ArrowDown'] || keys['s'] || keys['S']) dy = 1;

    if (touchActive && touchX !== null) {
        const tdx = touchX - player.x;
        if (Math.abs(tdx) > 5) dx = tdx > 0 ? 1 : -1;
    }

    if (dx !== 0 || dy !== 0) {
        const len = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
        player.x += (dx / len) * player.speed * deltaTime;
        player.y += (dy / len) * player.speed * deltaTime;
    }

    player.x = Math.max(player.width / 2, Math.min(360 - player.width / 2, player.x));
    player.y = Math.max(player.height / 2, Math.min(640 - player.height / 2, player.y));

    // Player trail
    player.trail.unshift({ x: player.x, y: player.y + player.height / 2, life: 0.3 });
    if (player.trail.length > 10) player.trail.pop();
    player.trail.forEach(t => t.life -= deltaTime);
    player.trail = player.trail.filter(t => t.life > 0);

    // Player invincibility
    if (player.invincible > 0) player.invincible -= deltaTime;

    // Shield timer
    if (player.shield) {
        player.shieldTimer -= deltaTime;
        if (player.shieldTimer <= 0) player.shield = false;
    }

    // Auto-fire
    player.fireTimer -= deltaTime;
    if (player.fireTimer <= 0) {
        fireBullet();
        player.fireTimer = player.fireRate;
    }

    // Update bullets
    bullets.forEach(b => {
        b.y -= b.speed * deltaTime;
        if (b.vx) b.x += b.vx * deltaTime;
    });
    bullets = bullets.filter(b => b.y > -20 && b.x > -20 && b.x < 380);

    // Enemy bullets
    enemyBullets.forEach(b => {
        b.x += b.vx * deltaTime;
        b.y += b.vy * deltaTime;
    });
    enemyBullets = enemyBullets.filter(b => b.x > -20 && b.x < 380 && b.y > -20 && b.y < 660);

    // Spawn enemies
    if (!bossActive || enemies.filter(e => e.type !== 'boss').length < 3) {
        enemySpawnTimer -= deltaTime;
        if (enemySpawnTimer <= 0) {
            spawnEnemy();
            enemySpawnTimer = enemySpawnRate;
        }
    }

    // Update enemies
    enemies.forEach(e => {
        e.time += deltaTime;

        if (e.type === 'boss') {
            // Boss movement
            if (e.y < e.targetY) {
                e.y += e.speed * deltaTime;
            } else {
                e.x = 180 + Math.sin(e.time * 1.5) * 100;
                e.fireTimer -= deltaTime;
                if (e.fireTimer <= 0) {
                    // Boss fires spread
                    for (let a = -0.4; a <= 0.4; a += 0.2) {
                        const angle = Math.PI / 2 + a;
                        const speed = 160;
                        enemyBullets.push({
                            x: e.x,
                            y: e.y + e.height / 2,
                            vx: Math.cos(angle) * speed,
                            vy: Math.sin(angle) * speed,
                            radius: 5,
                            color: '#e74c3c'
                        });
                    }
                    e.fireTimer = e.fireRate;
                }
            }
        } else if (e.type === 'zigzag') {
            e.y += e.speed * deltaTime;
            e.x = e.startX + Math.sin(e.time * 4) * 50;
        } else if (e.type === 'shooter') {
            e.y += e.speed * deltaTime;
            e.fireTimer -= deltaTime;
            if (e.fireTimer <= 0 && e.y > 50) {
                fireEnemyBullet(e);
                e.fireTimer = e.fireRate;
            }
        } else {
            e.y += e.speed * deltaTime;
        }
    });

    // Remove off-screen enemies
    enemies = enemies.filter(e => {
        if (e.y > 680 && e.type !== 'boss') {
            combo = 0;
            return false;
        }
        return true;
    });

    // Bullet-enemy collision
    bullets.forEach(b => {
        enemies.forEach(e => {
            if (b.dead || e.hp <= 0) return;
            if (rectCollision(b, e)) {
                b.dead = true;
                e.hp -= b.damage;
                createParticle(b.x, b.y, '#fff', 3, 50, 0.2);

                if (e.hp <= 0) {
                    combo++;
                    comboTimer = 2;
                    const comboMultiplier = Math.min(combo, 10);
                    score += e.score * comboMultiplier;
                    createExplosion(e.x, e.y, e.type === 'boss' ? 60 : 25, e.color);

                    if (e.type === 'boss') {
                        bossActive = false;
                        createExplosion(e.x - 20, e.y, 40, '#ffd93d');
                        createExplosion(e.x + 20, e.y - 10, 40, '#ff6b35');
                        screenShake = 15;
                        // Drop multiple powerups
                        for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
                            setTimeout(() => spawnPowerup(e.x + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 40, e.y), i * 100);
                        }
                    } else if (Math.random() < 0.12) {
                        spawnPowerup(e.x, e.y);
                    }
                }
            }
        });
    });
    bullets = bullets.filter(b => !b.dead);
    enemies = enemies.filter(e => e.hp > 0);

    // Enemy-player collision
    enemies.forEach(e => {
        if (rectCollision(player, e)) {
            if (e.type !== 'boss') {
                e.hp = 0;
                createExplosion(e.x, e.y, 20, e.color);
            }
            damagePlayer();
        }
    });
    enemies = enemies.filter(e => e.hp > 0);

    // Enemy bullet-player collision
    enemyBullets.forEach(b => {
        if (circleRectCollision(b.x, b.y, b.radius, player.x, player.y, player.width, player.height)) {
            b.dead = true;
            damagePlayer();
        }
    });
    enemyBullets = enemyBullets.filter(b => !b.dead);

    // Powerup collection
    powerups.forEach(p => {
        p.y += p.speed * deltaTime;
        p.time += deltaTime;
        if (rectCollision(player, p)) {
            p.collected = true;
            createParticle(p.x, p.y, p.color, 10, 60, 0.4);
            switch (p.type) {
                case 'power':
                    player.powerLevel = Math.min(2, player.powerLevel + 1);
                    break;
                case 'shield':
                    player.shield = true;
                    player.shieldTimer = 10;
                    break;
                case 'life':
                    player.lives = Math.min(player.maxLives, player.lives + 1);
                    break;
                case 'rapid':
                    player.fireRate = Math.max(0.08, player.fireRate - 0.03);
                    break;
            }
        }
    });
    powerups = powerups.filter(p => !p.collected && p.y < 660);

    // Update particles
    particles.forEach(p => {
        p.x += p.vx * deltaTime;
        p.y += p.vy * deltaTime;
        p.life -= deltaTime;
        p.vx *= 0.98;
        p.vy *= 0.98;
    });
    particles = particles.filter(p => p.life > 0);

    // Update explosions
    explosions.forEach(e => {
        e.life -= deltaTime * 3;
        e.radius = e.maxRadius * (1 - e.life);
    });
    explosions = explosions.filter(e => e.life > 0);

    // Screen shake decay
    if (screenShake > 0) screenShake *= 0.9;
    if (screenShake < 0.5) screenShake = 0;

    // Update stars
    stars.forEach(s => {
        s.y += s.speed * deltaTime;
        if (s.y > 640) {
            s.y = 0;
            s.x = Math.random() * 360;
        }
    });
}

// RENDER
function render() {
    ctx.save();

    // Screen shake
    if (screenShake > 0) {
        ctx.translate(
            (Math.random() - 0.5) * screenShake,
            (Math.random() - 0.5) * screenShake
        );
    }

    // Background
    const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, 640);
    gradient.addColorStop(0, '#1a1a2e');
    gradient.addColorStop(1, '#16213e');
    ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 360, 640);

    // Stars
    stars.forEach(s => {
        ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${s.brightness})`;
        ctx.fillRect(s.x, s.y, s.size, s.size);
    });

    if (gameState === 'menu') {
        renderMenu();
        ctx.restore();
        return;
    }

    if (gameState === 'gameover') {
        renderGameplay();
        renderGameOver();
        ctx.restore();
        return;
    }

    if (gameState === 'paused') {
        renderGameplay();
        renderPaused();
        ctx.restore();
        return;
    }

    renderGameplay();
    ctx.restore();
}

function renderGameplay() {
    // Explosions (behind everything)
    explosions.forEach(e => {
        const alpha = e.life;
        const grad = ctx.createRadialGradient(e.x, e.y, 0, e.x, e.y, e.radius);
        grad.addColorStop(0, `rgba(255, 255, 255, ${alpha})`);
        grad.addColorStop(0.3, e.color + Math.floor(alpha * 180).toString(16).padStart(2, '0'));
        grad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)');
        ctx.fillStyle = grad;
        ctx.fillRect(e.x - e.radius, e.y - e.radius, e.radius * 2, e.radius * 2);
    });

    // Player trail
    player.trail.forEach((t, i) => {
        const alpha = t.life / 0.3 * 0.3;
        ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(79, 209, 197, ${alpha})`;
        const size = 4 * (t.life / 0.3);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(t.x, t.y, size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();
    });

    // Bullets
    bullets.forEach(b => {
        // Glow
        const grad = ctx.createRadialGradient(b.x, b.y, 0, b.x, b.y, 8);
        grad.addColorStop(0, b.color + '80');
        grad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
        ctx.fillStyle = grad;
        ctx.fillRect(b.x - 8, b.y - 8, 16, 16);

        ctx.fillStyle = b.color;
        ctx.fillRect(b.x - b.width / 2, b.y - b.height / 2, b.width, b.height);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
        ctx.fillRect(b.x - 1, b.y - b.height / 2, 2, b.height);
    });

    // Enemy bullets
    enemyBullets.forEach(b => {
        const grad = ctx.createRadialGradient(b.x, b.y, 0, b.x, b.y, b.radius * 2);
        grad.addColorStop(0, b.color);
        grad.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
        ctx.fillStyle = grad;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(b.x, b.y, b.radius * 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();

        ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(b.x, b.y, b.radius * 0.5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();
    });

    // Enemies
    enemies.forEach(e => {
        ctx.save();
        ctx.translate(e.x, e.y);

        if (e.type === 'boss') {
            // Boss body
            const bossGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(-30, -25, 30, 25);
            bossGrad.addColorStop(0, '#c0392b');
            bossGrad.addColorStop(1, '#e74c3c');
            ctx.fillStyle = bossGrad;

            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(0, -25);
            ctx.lineTo(-30, 10);
            ctx.lineTo(-20, 25);
            ctx.lineTo(20, 25);
            ctx.lineTo(30, 10);
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();

            // Boss wings
            ctx.fillStyle = '#922b21';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(-30, 10);
            ctx.lineTo(-45, 0);
            ctx.lineTo(-35, 20);
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(30, 10);
            ctx.lineTo(45, 0);
            ctx.lineTo(35, 20);
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();

            // Boss eye
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd93d';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(0, 0, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.fillStyle = '#e74c3c';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(0, 0, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();

            // HP bar
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)';
            ctx.fillRect(-30, -35, 60, 6);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#e74c3c';
            ctx.fillRect(-30, -35, 60 * (e.hp / e.maxHp), 6);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#fff3';
            ctx.strokeRect(-30, -35, 60, 6);
        } else {
            // Regular enemy glow
            const glow = ctx.createRadialGradient(0, 0, 0, 0, 0, e.width);
            glow.addColorStop(0, e.color + '40');
            glow.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
            ctx.fillStyle = glow;
            ctx.fillRect(-e.width, -e.height, e.width * 2, e.height * 2);

            // Enemy body
            ctx.fillStyle = e.color;
            if (e.type === 'basic') {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(0, -e.height / 2);
                ctx.lineTo(-e.width / 2, e.height / 2);
                ctx.lineTo(e.width / 2, e.height / 2);
                ctx.closePath();
                ctx.fill();
            } else if (e.type === 'fast') {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.moveTo(0, -e.height / 2);
                ctx.lineTo(-e.width / 2, 0);
                ctx.lineTo(-e.width / 4, e.height / 2);
                ctx.lineTo(e.width / 4, e.height / 2);
                ctx.lineTo(e.width / 2, 0);
                ctx.closePath();
                ctx.fill();
            } else if (e.type === 'tank') {
                ctx.fillRect(-e.width / 2, -e.height / 2, e.width, e.height);
                ctx.fillStyle = '#7d3c98';
                ctx.fillRect(-e.width / 2 + 3, -e.height / 2 + 3, e.width - 6, e.height - 6);
                // HP bar for tank
                ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)';
                ctx.fillRect(-e.width / 2, -e.height / 2 - 8, e.width, 4);
                ctx.fillStyle = e.color;
                ctx.fillRect(-e.width / 2, -e.height / 2 - 8, e.width * (e.hp / e.maxHp), 4);
            } else if (e.type === 'zigzag') {
                ctx.beginPath();
                for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
                    const a = (i / 6) * Math.PI * 2 - Math.PI / 2;
                    const r = e.width / 2;
                    if (i === 0) ctx.moveTo(Math.cos(a) * r, Math.sin(a) * r);
                    else ctx.lineTo(Math.cos(a) * r, Math.sin(a) * r);
                }
                ctx.closePath();
                ctx.fill();
            } else if (e.type === 'shooter') {
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(0, 0, e.width / 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
                ctx.fillStyle = '#c0392b';
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(0, 0, e.width / 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
            }

            // Enemy eye/core
            if (e.type !== 'tank') {
                ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(0, e.type === 'basic' ? 2 : 0, 3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
            }
        }

        ctx.restore();
    });

    // Powerups
    powerups.forEach(p => {
        ctx.save();
        ctx.translate(p.x, p.y);

        // Floating animation
        const floatY = Math.sin(p.time * 4) * 3;
        ctx.translate(0, floatY);

        // Glow
        const glow = ctx.createRadialGradient(0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 18);
        glow.addColorStop(0, p.color + '60');
        glow.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
        ctx.fillStyle = glow;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(0, 0, 18, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();

        // Body
        ctx.fillStyle = p.color;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(0, 0, 10, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#fff8';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(0, 0, 10, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.stroke();

        // Symbol
        ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
        ctx.font = 'bold 11px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
        ctx.textAlign = 'center';
        ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
        ctx.fillText(p.symbol, 0, 0);

        ctx.restore();
    });

    // Player
    if (player.lives > 0 && !(player.invincible > 0 && Math.floor(player.invincible * 10) % 2 === 0)) {
        ctx.save();
        ctx.translate(player.x, player.y);

        // Engine glow
        const engineGlow = ctx.createRadialGradient(0, player.height / 2 + 5, 0, 0, player.height / 2 + 5, 15);
        engineGlow.addColorStop(0, '#4fd1c580');
        engineGlow.addColorStop(0.5, '#4fd1c530');
        engineGlow.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
        ctx.fillStyle = engineGlow;
        ctx.fillRect(-15, player.height / 2 - 5, 30, 25);

        // Engine flame
        const flameHeight = 8 + Math.random() * 6;
        ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(-6, player.height / 2);
        ctx.lineTo(0, player.height / 2 + flameHeight);
        ctx.lineTo(6, player.height / 2);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();

        ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(-3, player.height / 2);
        ctx.lineTo(0, player.height / 2 + flameHeight * 0.6);
        ctx.lineTo(3, player.height / 2);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();

        // Ship body
        const shipGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(-16, 0, 16, 0);
        shipGrad.addColorStop(0, '#2d3748');
        shipGrad.addColorStop(0.5, '#4a5568');
        shipGrad.addColorStop(1, '#2d3748');
        ctx.fillStyle = shipGrad;

        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(0, -player.height / 2);
        ctx.lineTo(-16, player.height / 2);
        ctx.lineTo(-12, player.height / 2 - 4);
        ctx.lineTo(0, player.height / 2 - 8);
        ctx.lineTo(12, player.height / 2 - 4);
        ctx.lineTo(16, player.height / 2);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();

        // Ship detail lines
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#4fd1c5';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(0, -player.height / 2);
        ctx.lineTo(-10, player.height / 4);
        ctx.moveTo(0, -player.height / 2);
        ctx.lineTo(10, player.height / 4);
        ctx.stroke();

        // Cockpit
        ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(0, -4, 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(0, -5, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();

        // Wings
        ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c580';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(-12, 6);
        ctx.lineTo(-20, 14);
        ctx.lineTo(-14, 12);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(12, 6);
        ctx.lineTo(20, 14);
        ctx.lineTo(14, 12);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();

        // Shield
        if (player.shield) {
            ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(99, 179, 237, ${0.5 + Math.sin(gameTime * 6) * 0.3})`;
            ctx.lineWidth = 2;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(0, 0, 24, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.stroke();

            const shieldGlow = ctx.createRadialGradient(0, 0, 18, 0, 0, 26);
            shieldGlow.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(99, 179, 237, 0)');
            shieldGlow.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(99, 179, 237, 0.15)');
            ctx.fillStyle = shieldGlow;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(0, 0, 26, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        }

        ctx.restore();
    }

    // Particles
    particles.forEach(p => {
        const alpha = p.life / p.maxLife;
        ctx.globalAlpha = alpha;
        ctx.fillStyle = p.color;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.size * alpha, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();
    });
    ctx.globalAlpha = 1;

    // HUD
    renderHUD();
}

function renderHUD() {
    // Score
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3)';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 360, 50);

    ctx.font = 'bold 14px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
    ctx.fillText('得分', 180, 16);
    ctx.font = 'bold 22px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
    ctx.fillText(score.toLocaleString(), 180, 40);

    // Level
    ctx.font = '12px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
    ctx.textAlign = 'left';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#a0aec0';
    ctx.fillText(`关卡 ${level}`, 12, 18);

    // Combo
    if (combo > 1) {
        ctx.textAlign = 'right';
        ctx.font = 'bold 14px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd93d';
        ctx.fillText(`×${Math.min(combo, 10)} 连击`, 348, 18);
    }

    // Lives
    ctx.textAlign = 'left';
    for (let i = 0; i < player.lives; i++) {
        ctx.fillStyle = '#fc8181';
        ctx.font = '16px sans-serif';
        ctx.fillText('♥', 12 + i * 20, 40);
    }

    // Power level
    if (player.powerLevel > 0) {
        ctx.textAlign = 'right';
        ctx.font = '12px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
        ctx.fillStyle = '#b794f6';
        ctx.fillText('⚡'.repeat(player.powerLevel), 348, 40);
    }

    // Shield indicator
    if (player.shield) {
        ctx.textAlign = 'right';
        ctx.font = '10px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
        ctx.fillStyle = '#63b3ed';
        ctx.fillText(`🛡 ${Math.ceil(player.shieldTimer)}s`, 348, 55);
    }

    // Boss HP bar at top
    const boss = enemies.find(e => e.type === 'boss');
    if (boss && boss.y >= boss.targetY - 10) {
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0,0,0,0.5)';
        ctx.fillRect(30, 56, 300, 8);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#e74c3c';
        ctx.fillRect(30, 56, 300 * (boss.hp / boss.maxHp), 8);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#fff3';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1;
        ctx.strokeRect(30, 56, 300, 8);
        ctx.font = 'bold 10px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
        ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
        ctx.textAlign = 'center';
        ctx.fillText('BOSS', 180, 55);
    }

    // Pause button
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.3)';
    ctx.fillRect(320, 58, 30, 20);
    ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
    ctx.font = '12px sans-serif';
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.fillText('⏸', 335, 72);
}

function renderMenu() {
    // Title
    ctx.save();

    // Title glow
    const titleGlow = ctx.createRadialGradient(180, 200, 0, 180, 200, 150);
    titleGlow.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(79, 209, 197, 0.15)');
    titleGlow.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0,0,0,0)');
    ctx.fillStyle = titleGlow;
    ctx.fillRect(30, 100, 300, 200);

    ctx.font = 'bold 42px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
    ctx.fillText('太空射击', 180, 210);

    ctx.font = '16px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#a0aec0';
    ctx.fillText('SPACE SHOOTER', 180, 240);

    // Ship preview
    ctx.save();
    ctx.translate(180, 340);
    const hover = Math.sin(Date.now() / 500) * 5;
    ctx.translate(0, hover);

    ctx.fillStyle = '#4a5568';
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(0, -30);
    ctx.lineTo(-20, 20);
    ctx.lineTo(0, 12);
    ctx.lineTo(20, 20);
    ctx.closePath();
    ctx.fill();

    ctx.strokeStyle = '#4fd1c5';
    ctx.lineWidth = 2;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(0, -30);
    ctx.lineTo(-12, 8);
    ctx.moveTo(0, -30);
    ctx.lineTo(12, 8);
    ctx.stroke();

    ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(0, -6, 5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fill();

    ctx.restore();

    // Start button
    const btnY = 440;
    const pulse = Math.sin(Date.now() / 300) * 0.1 + 0.9;
    ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(79, 209, 197, ${0.2 * pulse})`;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.roundRect(100, btnY - 5, 160, 50, 12);
    ctx.fill();

    ctx.strokeStyle = '#4fd1c5';
    ctx.lineWidth = 2;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.roundRect(100, btnY - 5, 160, 50, 12);
    ctx.stroke();

    ctx.font = 'bold 20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
    ctx.fillText('开始游戏', 180, btnY + 25);

    // High score
    ctx.font = '14px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#a0aec0';
    ctx.fillText(`最高分: ${highScore.toLocaleString()}`, 180, 530);

    // Controls
    ctx.font = '12px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#718096';
    ctx.fillText('方向键/WASD 移动 | 自动射击', 180, 570);
    ctx.fillText('触屏: 点击移动', 180, 590);
    ctx.fillText('P 暂停', 180, 610);

    ctx.restore();
}

function renderGameOver() {
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 360, 640);

    ctx.font = 'bold 36px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#fc8181';
    ctx.fillText('游戏结束', 180, 220);

    ctx.font = '16px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#a0aec0';
    ctx.fillText('最终得分', 180, 280);

    ctx.font = 'bold 32px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
    ctx.fillText(score.toLocaleString(), 180, 320);

    if (score >= highScore && score > 0) {
        ctx.font = 'bold 16px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ffd93d';
        ctx.fillText('🏆 新纪录！', 180, 355);
    }

    ctx.font = '14px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#a0aec0';
    ctx.fillText(`最高分: ${highScore.toLocaleString()}`, 180, 390);
    ctx.fillText(`到达关卡: ${level}`, 180, 415);

    // Retry button
    const btnY = 460;
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(79, 209, 197, 0.2)';
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.roundRect(100, btnY, 160, 50, 12);
    ctx.fill();

    ctx.strokeStyle = '#4fd1c5';
    ctx.lineWidth = 2;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.roundRect(100, btnY, 160, 50, 12);
    ctx.stroke();

    ctx.font = 'bold 18px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
    ctx.fillText('再来一次', 180, btnY + 30);

    // Menu button
    const btn2Y = 530;
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#a0aec0';
    ctx.lineWidth = 1;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.roundRect(120, btn2Y, 120, 40, 10);
    ctx.stroke();

    ctx.font = '14px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#a0aec0';
    ctx.fillText('返回菜单', 180, btn2Y + 25);
}

function renderPaused() {
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6)';
    ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 360, 640);

    ctx.font = 'bold 32px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
    ctx.fillText('暂停', 180, 300);

    ctx.font = '16px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
    ctx.fillStyle = '#a0aec0';
    ctx.fillText('按 P 或点击继续', 180, 340);
}

// INPUT HANDLING
function handleInput(key, pressed) {
    keys[key] = pressed;

    if (!pressed) return;

    if (key === 'p' || key === 'P' || key === 'Escape') {
        if (gameState === 'playing') {
            gameState = 'paused';
        } else if (gameState === 'paused') {
            gameState = 'playing';
        }
    }

    if (key === 'Enter' || key === ' ') {
        if (gameState === 'menu') {
            resetGame();
            gameState = 'playing';
        } else if (gameState === 'gameover') {
            resetGame();
            gameState = 'playing';
        }
    }
}

document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    handleInput(e.key, true);
    if (['ArrowUp', 'ArrowDown', 'ArrowLeft', 'ArrowRight', ' '].includes(e.key)) {
        e.preventDefault();
    }
});

document.addEventListener('keyup', e => {
    handleInput(e.key, false);
});

// Touch controls
canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', e => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    const scaleX = canvas.width / rect.width;
    const scaleY = canvas.height / rect.height;
    const tx = (e.touches[0].clientX - rect.left) * scaleX;
    const ty = (e.touches[0].clientY - rect.top) * scaleY;

    if (gameState === 'menu') {
        if (tx >= 100 && tx <= 260 && ty >= 435 && ty <= 490) {
            resetGame();
            gameState = 'playing';
        }
        return;
    }

    if (gameState === 'gameover') {
        if (tx >= 100 && tx <= 260 && ty >= 460 && ty <= 510) {
            resetGame();
            gameState = 'playing';
        }
        if (tx >= 120 && tx <= 240 && ty >= 530 && ty <= 570) {
            gameState = 'menu';
        }
        return;
    }

    if (gameState === 'paused') {
        gameState = 'playing';
        return;
    }

    if (gameState === 'playing') {
        // Pause button
        if (tx >= 320 && tx <= 350 && ty >= 58 && ty <= 78) {
            gameState = 'paused';
            return;
        }
        touchActive = true;
        touchX = tx;
    }
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', e => {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (touchActive && gameState === 'playing') {
        const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
        const scaleX = canvas.width / rect.width;
        touchX = (e.touches[0].clientX - rect.left) * scaleX;
    }
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchend', e => {
    e.preventDefault();
    touchActive = false;
    touchX = null;
});

// Mouse controls
canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', e => {
    const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
    const scaleX = canvas.width / rect.width;
    const scaleY = canvas.height / rect.height;
    const mx = (e.clientX - rect.left) * scaleX;
    const my = (e.clientY - rect.top) * scaleY;

    if (gameState === 'menu') {
        if (mx >= 100 && mx <= 260 && my >= 435 && my <= 490) {
            resetGame();
            gameState = 'playing';
        }
        return;
    }

    if (gameState === 'gameover') {
        if (mx >= 100 && mx <= 260 && my >= 460 && my <= 510) {
            resetGame();
            gameState = 'playing';
        }
        if (mx >= 120 && mx <= 240 && my >= 530 && my <= 570) {
            gameState = 'menu';
        }
        return;
    }

    if (gameState === 'paused') {
        gameState = 'playing';
        return;
    }

    if (gameState === 'playing') {
        if (mx >= 320 && mx <= 350 && my >= 58 && my <= 78) {
            gameState = 'paused';
            return;
        }
        touchActive = true;
        touchX = mx;
    }
});

canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
    if (touchActive && gameState === 'playing') {
        const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();
        const scaleX = canvas.width / rect.width;
        touchX = (e.clientX - rect.left) * scaleX;
    }
});

canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
    touchActive = false;
    touchX = null;
});

// GAME LOOP
function gameLoop(timestamp) {
    const deltaTime = Math.min((timestamp - lastTime) / 1000, 0.05);
    lastTime = timestamp;

    update(deltaTime);
    render();

    requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
}

// Start
lastTime = performance.now();
requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
</script>
</body>
</html>
